# TrustyPassword — llms.txt
# https://llmstxt.org
# This file helps AI assistants and language models understand this site.

> Free password generator — TrustyPassword

## Tool
- [Password Generator](https://trustypassword.org/): Free browser-based secure password generator. No data stored. Uses Web Crypto API.

## Blog
- [Blog Index](https://trustypassword.org/blog/): Security guides, password tips, and cybersecurity best practices.

### Recent Articles
- [Security Keys Explained: YubiKey and FIDO2 Hardware Tokens](https://trustypassword.org/blog/posts/security-keys-explained-yubikey-and-fido2-hardware-tokens.html): Hardware security keys are the strongest form of two-factor authentication available. Here's everything you need to know.
- [How to Recover a Hacked Account: A Step-by-Step Guide](https://trustypassword.org/blog/posts/how-to-recover-a-hacked-account-a-step-by-step-guide.html): Discovering you've been hacked is stressful. Here's exactly what to do in the first 24 hours to limit the damage.
- [How Long Would It Take to Crack Your Password?](https://trustypassword.org/blog/posts/how-long-would-it-take-to-crack-your-password.html): Password cracking speeds have increased dramatically with modern GPUs. Find out how your current passwords measure up.
- [Securing Your Small Business: Password Policies That Actually Work](https://trustypassword.org/blog/posts/securing-your-small-business-password-policies-that-actually-work.html): Password breaches cost UK businesses millions each year. Here's a practical framework for protecting your team and your data.
- [Passkeys: The Technology That Will Replace Passwords](https://trustypassword.org/blog/posts/passkeys-the-technology-that-will-replace-passwords.html): Tech giants are ditching passwords entirely. Here's how passkeys work and why they're the future of online security.
- [The Top 10 Most Common Passwords — And Why You Must Avoid Them](https://trustypassword.org/blog/posts/the-top-10-most-common-passwords-and-why-you-must-avoid-them.html): Millions of people still use shockingly weak passwords. See the worst offenders and learn what a truly secure password looks like.
- [Have I Been Pwned? How to Check if Your Password Was Leaked](https://trustypassword.org/blog/posts/have-i-been-pwned-how-to-check-if-your-password-was-leaked.html): Data breaches happen every day. Find out if your email and passwords have been compromised — and what to do about it.
- [Two-Factor Authentication: The Extra Lock on Your Digital Life](https://trustypassword.org/blog/posts/two-factor-authentication-the-extra-lock-on-your-digital-life.html): A strong password alone isn't enough. Two-factor authentication adds a critical second layer of security to your accounts.
- [Why Strong Passwords Are Your First Line of Defence](https://trustypassword.org/blog/posts/why-strong-passwords-are-your-first-line-of-defence.html): Most data breaches happen because of weak or reused passwords. Here's how to protect yourself today.
- [Password Manager vs Browser Password Saving: Which Is Safer?](https://trustypassword.org/blog/posts/password-manager-vs-browser-password-saving-which-is-safer.html): Browsers offer to save your passwords — but is that actually safe? We compare browser storage vs dedicated password managers.

## Key Facts
- Free to use, no sign-up required
- 100% client-side — no passwords ever leave your device
- Uses crypto.getRandomValues() for cryptographic randomness
- Built-in HaveIBeenPwned breach checker (k-anonymity — password never transmitted)
- Supports bulk generation, custom character sets, strength analysis

## Affiliate Disclosure
TrustyPassword may contain affiliate links to password managers including NordPass, 1Password, and Dashlane.
